destination_address_prefix.description: Specifies single destination IP range in CIDR

destination_address_prefixes.description: List of destination IP ranges in CIDR format

destination_application_security_group_i.description: List of destination application security group IDs

destination_port_range.description: Specifies single destination port or range (e.g., 80 or 100-200)

destination_port_ranges.description: List of destination ports or port ranges

name.description: Defines the unique name of the security rule

network_security_group_name.description: Name of the associated network security group

priority.description: Controls rule priority (lower value has higher priority)

protocol.description: Specifies allowed protocol (e.g., TCP, UDP, or *)

source_address_prefix.description: Specifies single source IP range in CIDR

source_address_prefixes.description: List of source IP ranges in CIDR format

source_application_security_group_ids.description: List of source application security group IDs

source_port_range.description: Specifies single source port or range (e.g., 22 or 3000-4000)

source_port_ranges.description: List of source ports or port ranges

timeouts.description: Configures operation timeouts for create, read, update, and delete

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
